code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(token)
          match string.parse_int(token)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          token = ""
        end
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted_unique(_ acc: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(acc, x)
    acc
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    for y in acc
      if not inserted and x < y
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, y)
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    result
  end
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
let line2 = read_line_or_empty()

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)

mut intersection: List<Int> = []
for x in a
  if list.contains(b, x)
    intersection = insert_sorted_unique(intersection, x)
  end
end

let total = list.len(intersection)
if total == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < total
    match list.get(intersection, i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
